channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Construction of BRT Red Line on Karachi's University Road Resumes Under FWO
item.description: The Frontier Works Organisation (FWO) has officially resumed construction on the BRT Red Line project along Karachi’s University Road. Karachi Mayor Murtaza Wahab confirmed that work has restarted jus...

item.title: President Trump discusses his reaction to the White House Correspondents' Dinner security incident
item.description: In an interview with CBS News' '60 Minutes,' President Donald Trump reflected on the security incident that occurred at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, where he was swiftly evacuated after sho...

item.title: Unusual Disruption in Panama’s Ocean Upwelling Raises Climate Change Concerns
item.description: For the first time in over four decades, Panama’s crucial ocean upwelling event did not occur in 2025, a surprising disruption that scientists have linked to weakening wind patterns. The seasonal upwe...

item.title: Nigeria Faces Rising Insecurity and Urgent Need for State Policing
item.description: Nigerians dey face serious wahala as insecurity don scatter everywhere for di country. People don dey use humour to cope, even dey twist nursery rhymes to reflect violence: 'A for Axe; B for Bomb; C f...

item.title: Ongoing Middle East Conflict: April 27, 2026 Developments and Updates
item.description: This live updates report from GMA News provides real-time information tungkol sa patuloy na tensyon at armadong labanan sa Middle East as of April 27, 2026. The coverage highlights key developments in...

item.title: 'I'm A Celeb' live final saw tense off-camera moments, emotional contestants, and attempts at reconciliation
item.description: During the chaotic live final of 'I'm A Celebrity… Get Me Out of Here!' in 2026, significant drama unfolded that was not broadcast to viewers. Former boxer David Haye, previously accused of bullying e...

item.title: Yanga and Simba set for decisive Union Cup final clash in Zanzibar
item.description: Yanga and Simba SC are set to face each other once again in a much-anticipated Kariakoo Derby during the 2026 Union Cup final, which will be played on April 29 at the New Amaan Complex in Zanzibar. Th...

item.title: Trump and Melania Take Cover During Security Incident at White House Correspondents' Dinner
item.description: During the White House Correspondents' Dinner at the Washington Hilton Hotel, an attempted security breach occurred when a gunman opened fire, prompting a swift response from the Secret Service and la...

item.title: Atiku rejects proposal to halt political campaigns in northern states over insecurity concerns
item.description: Former Vice President Atiku Abubakar don strongly criticise proposal from the National Assembly wey suggest make dem suspend political campaigns for some northern states before the 2027 general electi...

item.title: President Trump uses security incident to advocate for White House ballroom construction
item.description: Following a chaotic shooting incident at the annual White House Correspondents’ Dinner at the Washington Hilton on Saturday night, U.S. President Donald Trump has renewed his push for the construction...

item.title: Analysis of Martin Romualdez’s Statement Denying Corruption Allegations
item.description: Former House Speaker Martin Romualdez publicly addressed corruption allegations against him on April 21 through a recorded video statement, marking his first direct response as scrutiny from the Offic...

item.title: Jos Verstappen Involved in Rally Car Accident
item.description: Jos Verstappen, father of Formula 1 driver Max Verstappen, was involved in a significant rally car accident recently. The incident occurred during a rally event where Jos was participating. While deta...

item.title: Seventh Millionaire winner revealed as contestant answers all 15 questions on ITV quiz show
item.description: Roman Dubowski, a retired IT consultant, has become the seventh person to win the top £1 million prize on ITV’s Who Wants To Be A Millionaire during the opening episode of the programme’s 35th series....

item.title: Blouge Wine: The New Trend Blending White and Red Grapes
item.description: Blouge wine, a mix of white (blanc) and red (rouge) grapes, is gaining popularity across the globe, particularly in natural wine circles. The trend was sparked by a happy accident at a northern Italia...

item.title: Moderate 6.1 Magnitude Earthquake Hits Hokkaido Region Without Immediate Damage
item.description: A preliminary magnitude 6.1 earthquake struck northern Japan in the early hours of April 27, 2026, as reported by the United States Geological Survey (USGS). The tremor occurred in Hokkaido, one of Ja...

item.title: Kenya's Sabastian Sawe Becomes First Man to Run a Sub-Two-Hour Marathon in Official Race
item.description: Kenya's Sabastian Sawe has made history by becoming the first man to officially run a marathon in under two hours, clocking 1:59:30 at the 2026 London Marathon. Sawe, unbeaten in all marathons since h...

item.title: Sundowns Drop Points Again as Pirates Fail to Extend Lead
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns missed another opportunity to take top spot in the Betway Premiership after they were held to a 0-0 draw by Richards Bay FC in a match at Umhlatuze Sports Complex. This followed a di...

item.title: Master Hanz Cua's Feng Shui Forecast for April 27, 2026
item.description: On April 27, 2026, Master Hanz Cua offers his feng shui predictions, focusing on how various elements of the Chinese metaphysical system can influence personal and professional aspects of life. Known ...

item.title: Garissa Woman in Custody Over Potentially Inciting Social Media Videos
item.description: A woman from Garissa, Bare Sahara Ahmed, has been arrested following the spread of a viral video that authorities say contains statements likely to undermine national cohesion. The video shows Sahara ...

item.title: NRS Denies Any New Vehicle Tax, Warns Public Against False Info
item.description: The Nigeria Revenue Service (NRS) don clarify say no new vehicle tax don come up, despite wahala wey dey go round for social media. According to the NRS, some viral message dey claim say from July 1, ...
